enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog from Boulder on February 17, 2016, reflecting on his time away from YouTube and modern news. He discusses immersing himself in historical/past voices through audio content and shares his excitement about recently starting to follow news again via text-to-speech on his computer.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deliberately avoided modern news to focus on historical perspectives and past thinkers
excited to return to making video logs after a long break
newly enthusiastic about having the computer read news articles aloud

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is very excited about doing video logs again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels like he's at a point where he wonders why he's been doing video logs, as it seems like everyone is doing them now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had been out of the loop on YouTube, having last watched it actively around 2008-2009 in Atlanta.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle doesn't know much about current YouTube trends or content.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle recently started listening to The Huffington Post articles read by a computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle hasn't been paying attention to modern news because he felt it would take away from his time focusing on audio work and other projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes that sometimes you have to block out certain things (like the current world) to understand other things (like the past world).

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wanted to block out the modern world to focus on the past world so he could later view the current world from a historical perspective.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Most of the people Kyle has been listening to in recent years are from long ago, making his social circle feel like it's from the past.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels like his friends are from old times rather than 2015, which he finds trippy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle lost his train of thought while talking about his perspective on time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has been working all day on complicated tasks related to his projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels kind of bad and hungry because it's morning and he hasn't eaten yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is now ready to talk and plans to start doing more videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is super excited about listening to news articles with his computer for the first time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks it's cool that the computer can read news articles to him, even if it takes a while.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to cook later but feels okay for now.
